source_jobs.title: Account Executive - East
source_jobs.description:
About billups:

We don’t trade in hype. At billups, we’re reimagining how brands show up in the real world, literally. Powered by patented technology, proprietary AI, and a global team of 400+, we’re reinventing Out-of-Home (OOH) media to help brands connect with people in physical spaces, with more precision, intelligence, and impact than ever before. We move fast, think boldly, and collaborate deeply. Fiercely independent, with a presence in 20+ countries, we back smart ideas with data, technology, and trust. Growth is on the table, professionally and personally. We invest in talent and celebrate our people, plain and simple. Curious? Let’s talk.

The Role:

The Client Team (comprising Client Services and Client Development functions) undertakes a wide range of responsibilities in driving billupsʼ business forward, developing and nurturing client and partner relationships. As part of our Client Services function, the Account Executive role collaborates closely with peers, Assistant(s), Senior Account Executive(s), Account Manager(s), Senior Account Manager(s), Account Director(s) and Senior Account Director(s).

Who you are:

 - Required 1-2 years of experience.

 - A solid foundation of the planning process, including, but not limited to, RFP collation, grid development, Platform/mapping, Planning tools and systems, posting instructions, creating POP reports, etc.

 - A base knowledge of the OOH media landscape, including client and supplier news and activity.

 - A growth mindset with the confidence to apply this within your work.

 - Possible experience in negotiating pricing and booking campaigns.

 - The ability to calculate figures and amounts such as discounts, interest, commissions, proportions, percentages.

 - The desire to grow yourself and billupsʼ business.

Key Responsibilities:

Media Planning & Buying:

 - Support the day-to-day management of your clients, eﬀectively servicing them, and proactively contributing to growing client and agency business.

 - Support the Client Development function with the creation of, or access to, materials or content.

 - Ability to explain your media plan rationale to your line managers and work on translating that into client decks and emails, ensuring that your recommendation is delivered on the client brief.

 - Media plan development, RFP collation, grid development, DoMedia utilization, Platform/mapping, Planning tools & systems, posting instructions, creating POP reports, etc.

 - Small-level plan/project development/ownership, low-level negotiations, and managing client relationships with high-level oversight from the line manager are the main tasks.

Project Management:

 - Assist in managing shared file drive systems, ensuring all documents and content are appropriately saved and regularly updated. Compile, organize, and maintain accurate, up-to-date campaign files such as buy specs, decks, POP, etc.

 - With oversight, responsible for billupsʼ delivery in ensuring the timely activation of media campaigns for your clients.

 - Track campaign start dates and ensures everything is ready to go live on time; liaise with relevant vendors to manage artwork delivery and approval processes.

 - With oversight, responsible campaign reporting for your clients - access ʻProof of Posting (POP)ʼ and Campaign Attribution, ensuring this is received by clients and/or their agencies in a timely fashion.

 - Generate consistency and maintain high accuracy in all work through the adoption of appropriate templates and guidelines, ensuring operational excellence.

What you'll bring:

 - Learn to identify ways of delivering organic and diversified revenue growth within media plans and help convert these.

 - Build supplier relationships on a daily basis regarding the development and execution of industry-leading OOH planning.

 - Collaborate with internal teams.

 - Proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint

 - Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to maintain high levels of accuracy

source_jobs.title: Programmatic Executive
source_jobs.description:
What You’ll Do:

You’ll support the Programmatic Team’s Account Managers and Director across all facets of a campaign , helping respond to briefs, setting up programmatic campaigns using a range of targeting criteria across DSPs and our proprietary platform, and reporting and analyzing live campaign performance. You will ensure strong attention to detail and high-quality, consistent work, independently monitor and pace campaigns, troubleshoot common issues, and optimize as needed. You’ll contribute to campaign reporting, performance analysis, product and pipeline tasks, and media supply optimization while helping manage clients, identifying upsell opportunities, and supporting accurate campaign reconciliation.

What you'll bring:

 - 1–2 years of experience, numerical literacy, and evidence of data-driven decision-making and analysis; strong knowledge of OOH industry and OOH media strategies preferred.

 - Strong Excel and PowerPoint skills; proficient use of spreadsheets and slides for data analysis and presentations.

 - Demonstrable ability to learn quickly, think on your feet, and solve problems with a proactive mindset.

 - Excellent multitasking, strong presentation skills, flexible communication skills, and the ability to manage time and priorities effectively.

 - Ability to coordinate across multiple teams, work with a structured and methodical approach, collaborate as a strong team player, and communicate with confidence while explaining complex topics in simple terms.



Total Rewards

billups’ pay and benefits can vary by country, location, number of regularly scheduled hours worked, length of employment, and employment status.

 - Well-being programs including medical, dental and vision benefits (varies by market)

 - Generous 401(k) match program (USA) and pension schemes (global markets)

 - Annual bonus plans

 - Generous holiday and paid time off

 - Learning & Development offerings for global employees

 - Paid maternity leave and paternity leave (varies by country)

 - Local get togethers and community team building

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - EMEA
source_jobs.description:
About billups

We don’t trade in hype. At billups, we’re reimagining how brands show up in the real world, literally. Powered by patented technology, proprietary AI, and a global team of 400+, we’re reinventing Out-of-Home (OOH) media to help brands connect with people in physical spaces, with more precision, intelligence, and impact than ever before. We move fast, think boldly, and collaborate deeply. Fiercely independent, with a presence in 20+ countries, we back smart ideas with data, technology, and trust. Growth is on the table, professionally and personally. We invest in talent and celebrate our people, plain and simple. Curious? Let’s talk.

What You'll Do

The Client Team (comprising Client Services and Client Development functions) undertakes a wide range of responsibilities in driving Billups’ business forward, developing and nurturing client and partner relationships. As part of our Client Services function, the Account Executive role collaborates closely with peers, Account Manager(s), Senior Account Manager(s), Account Director(s) and Senior Account Director(s) in:

Core Role Duties

Media Planning & Buying

 - Support the day-to-day management of your clients, effectively servicing them, and proactively contributing to growing client and agency business

 - Support the Client Development function with the creation of, or access to, materials or content

 - Ability to explain your media plan rationale to your line managers and work on translating that into client decks and emails, ensuring that your recommendation is delivered on the client brief

 - Media plan development, RFP collation, grid development, Platform/mapping, planning tools & systems, posting instructions, creating POP reports, amongst other tasks

 - Small-level plan/project development/ownership, low-level negotiations, and managing client relationships with high-level oversight from the line manager are the main tasks

Project Management

 - Assist in managing shared file drive systems, ensuring all documents and content are appropriately saved and regularly updated. Compile, organize, and maintain accurate, up-to-date campaign files such as buy specs, decks, POP, etc

 - With oversight, responsible for Billups’ delivery in ensuring the timely activation of media campaigns for your clients

 - Track campaign start dates and ensure everything is ready to go live on time; liaise with relevant vendors to manage artwork delivery and approval processes

 - With oversight, provide responsible campaign reporting for your clients - access ‘Proof of Posting (POP)’ and Campaign Attribution, ensuring this is received by clients and/or their agencies in a timely fashion

 - Generate consistency and maintain high accuracy in all work through the adoption of appropriate templates and guidelines, ensuring operational excellence

 - Help coordinate calendars to arrange team meetings or presentations

Who You Are

 - Excellent organizational skills.

 - Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to maintain high levels of accuracy in tasks.

 - Must showcase strong time management skills.

 - Ability to manage multiple deadlines while maintaining high-quality standards.

 - Strong ability to receive and apply constructive feedback to achieve improved outcomes.

 - Good relationship management skills with the ability to communicate with directors, managers, and peers - both internally and externally. Establishing and maintaining excellent rapport.

 - Demonstrating tact and diplomacy in communicating with clients/agencies and media suppliers, as well as with colleagues internally.

 - Bringing creativity and passion to your work, embracing change and innovation.

 - Collaborating and contributing to the establishment of a positive team spirit. Being proactive and a team player, with the ability to engage others.

Qualifications

Ability to perform essential job duties with or without reasonable accommodation and without posing a direct threat to the safety o

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Manager - International
source_jobs.description:
About billups

We don’t trade in hype. At billups, we’re reimagining how brands show up in the real world, literally. Powered by patented technology, proprietary AI, and a global team of 400+, we’re reinventing Out-of-Home (OOH) media to help brands connect with people in physical spaces, with more precision, intelligence, and impact than ever before. We move fast, think boldly, and collaborate deeply. Fiercely independent, with a presence in 20+ countries, we back smart ideas with data, technology, and trust. Growth is on the table, professionally and personally. We invest in talent and celebrate our people, plain and simple. Curious? Let’s talk.

Who You Are

The International Senior Account Manager has a wide range of responsibilities in driving the business forward leading key clients and managing direct reports. You will also work closely with the Client Strategy Director to deliver and monitor client business plans, forecast and day to day business tasks.

Responsibilities

 - Lead clients with strategic approaches while managing client project requests and expectations and ensure plans and buys exceed client expectations, delivering Out of Home Excellence.

 - Proactivity in servicing clients and partners.

 - Have strong relationships with clients and partners alike to deliver enhanced OOH solutions for the client briefs and KPI’s across international markets.

 - Demonstrate an expert knowledge of the OOH media landscape.

 - UK or EMEA as well as US OOH planning experience and/or Comms planning experience – working on clients that spend significantly in OOH.

 - Strong relationship management skills with the ability to communicate across all levels both internally and externally.

 - The ability and desire to learn new international markets and work with local teams across multiple regions

 - Deliver the highest standard of client service levels.

 - Be pro-active and a team player with the ability to manage people and motivate them.

 - Commercial mindset with the confidence to apply this within your work.

 - Be responsible for the day-to-day management of the client team to ensure they are effectively servicing clients and are proactively contributing to growing client and agency business.

 - Have a thorough understanding of the strategy & objectives of your main accounts.

 - Ensure you and your team are delivering on all elements of client service charters and general client servicing.

 - Resolve client/campaign issues as and when they arise alongside assisting/coaching your team in resolving their issues.

 - Work with Media Lead to set individual client KPIs and ensure they are met.

 - Deliver operational excellence as an individual and as part of the team, ensuring you and the team are following processes (with a view of evolving and enhancing).

 - Help to manage and host internal training sessions.

 - Participate in defining the requirements to enhance systems/tools and have responsibility for testing them when requested.

 - Work with the Management Team of to provide accurate client forecasts ensuring they are kept up to date with key changes to forecasted business.

 - Comply with all company and departmental policies and procedures.

 - Showcases best practice planning to the team and monitors quality of output.

 - Builds and holds excellent rapport and relationships with Media Owners.

 - Experienced at negotiating pricing and booking campaigns.

 - Demonstrating knowledgeable opinion on vendor news and activity.

 - Experienced in resolving challenging client issues and team issues.

 - Mentor to colleagues and people out of the business.

Key Skills

 - Express ideas and thoughts verbally and in written form.

 - Exhibits good listening and comprehension.

 - Writes clearly and informatively.

 - Contributes to building a positive team spirit.

 - Demonstrate tact and diplomacy in communicating to clients/agencies and media suppliers as well as internally.

source_jobs.description:

We move fast, think boldly, and collaborate deeply. Fiercely independent, with a presence in 20+ countries, we back smart ideas with data, technology, and trust. Growth is on the table, professionally and personally. We invest in talent and celebrate our people, plain and simple. Curious? Let’s talk.

The Client Team (comprising Client Services and Client Development functions) undertakes a wide range of responsibilities in driving billupsʼ business forward, developing and nurturing client and partner relationships. As part of our Client Services function, the Account Manager role collaborates closely with reports, peers, Senior Account Manager(s), Account Director(s) and Senior Account Director(s) in:

Media Planning & Buying

 - Eﬀectively manage clients and proactively contribute to growing client and agency business.

 - Ensuring a thorough understanding of your client’s strategies, objectives, and the KPIs Billups must deliver for them.

 - Support the Client Development function with the creation of, or access to, materials or content.

 - Continue developing your strategic writing skills, working alongside managers will assist and support in writing strategies for larger client opportunities. Ensure media plans are being delivered by direct reports with basic objectives and rationale.

 - Receive direct oversight from the Account Director to begin challenging briefs, infuse strategic thinking, showcase the ability to utilize tools and systems to support the planning process, and articulate media rationale and storytelling.

 - Develop comprehensive media plans that eﬀectively utilize client budgets to achieve optimal results, working with SAM/AD/BD on strategic approach, insights, and rationale. Review and approve media-related contracts as necessary, ensuring compliance with agency standards and client expectations.

 - Responsible for independently and proactively leading the end-to-end planning process, ownership of accounts, client deliverables, and day-to-day management of your clients, including resolution of any campaign issues or discrepancies across your clients.

 - Mid to large level plan/project development/ownership, negotiations, building media owner and client relationships, managing client relationships with high-level oversight from line manager.

Project Management

 - Manage shared file drives, to ensure documents and content are saved in the relevant folders. Regularly updating client and media vendor documents and folders within our directory.

 - Responsible for ensuring the timely activation of media campaigns (for your SAE and below) - tracking campaign start dates and ensuring everything is ready to go live on time; liaising with relevant vendors to manage artwork delivery and approval processes.

 - Manage campaign reporting for your clients - accessing “Proof of Posting (POP)” and Campaign Attribution, ensuring this is received by clients and/or their agencies in a timely fashion.

 - Drive consistency in our work through self and team adoption of the appropriate templates and guidelines. Delivering operational excellence as an individual and with your team.

 - Juggle multiple project deadlines without compromising quality.

 - Oversight and coordination of calendars to arrange team meetings or presentations.



Business Development

 - Work to develop and convert new business opportunities, collaborating closely across relevant departments and with team leadership and Client Development colleagues in doing so.

 - Help your SAM(s) and AD(s) identify ways of delivering organic and diversified revenue growth, developing and conver

source_jobs.title: Account Manager - Canada
source_jobs.description:
Nom commercial de l’entreprise :

Billups

 

Adresse de l’entreprise :

66 Wellington Street West, bureau 4500

Toronto, Ontario M5K 1E6

 

Titre du poste :

Gestionnaire de comptes bilingue / Planificateur média

 

Langues de travail :

Français et anglais

 

Adresse et lieu de travail :
525, avenue Viger Ouest, bureau 400
Montréal, Québec, H2Z 0B2

 

Il s’agit d’un poste hybride (1-3 jours par semaine au bureau).

 

Conditions d’emploi :

Permanent, temps plein

Heures de travail : 40 heures par semaine

Salaire :
72 500,00 $ par année

Prime discrétionnaire de 0 % à 5 % selon la performance financière de l'entreprise et la performance individuelle

 

billups est à la recherche d’un(e) Gestionnaire de Comptes/Planificateur Média bilingue, talentueux(se) et motivé(e) pour rejoindre notre équipe de Montréal.

 

Ce poste hybride est une opportunité d'évoluer dans une équipe en pleine croissance, spécialisée dans l'industrie du média d’affichage (OOH).

 

Travaillant en étroite collaboration avec nos agences partenaires, les partenaires médias et les leaders de l’industrie, nous passons chaque minute de chaque jour à développer des solutions média percutantes et à planifier des campagnes d’affichage efficaces et mesurables pour nos clients.

 

Rejoignez notre équipe dynamique et continuez à développer vos compétences en matière de planification et d’achat OOH. Nous offrons un soutien solide et une formation continue, et travaillons avec d’excellents clients et partenaires médias.

Fonctions principales :

 - Gérer les relations quotidiennes avec les clients, les agences partenaires, les fournisseurs médias et les opérateurs médias, en veillant à bien comprendre les stratégies, les objectifs et les indicateurs clés de performance des clients.

 - Gérer plusieurs projets clients et échéanciers simultanément.

 - Planifier, acheter, négocier, coordonner et exécuter des campagnes média d’affichage extérieur, y compris des plans et projets de niveau intermédiaire à élevé.

 - Élaborer des plans média complets qui optimisent les budgets des clients et soutiennent les objectifs de campagne, incluant des recommandations claires, une justification stratégique et une narration média efficace.

 - Assurer la gestion quotidienne des comptes clients, des livrables, des échéanciers, du suivi des campagnes et de la résolution des enjeux ou écarts liés aux campagnes.

 - Préparer et présenter des propositions, des plans média, des présentations clients, des rapports de campagne, des preuves d’affichage, des documents d’attribution et d’autres documents connexes selon les standards de billups.

 - Coordonner l’activation des campagnes, notamment le suivi des dates de lancement, la gestion de la livraison et de l’approbation des créations, ainsi que la communication avec les fournisseurs concernés afin d’assurer le lancement des campagnes dans les délais prévus.

 - Utiliser les outils, plateformes, systèmes de planification et modèles internes afin de soutenir le processus de planification, assurer la qualité du travail et favoriser la cohérence des livrables clients.

 - Développer et maintenir des relations étroites avec les clients, agences, partenaires médias et fournisseurs, et participer aux rencontres ou événements pertinents avec les clients, partenaires ou acteurs de l’industrie, au besoin.

 - Maintenir une solide connaissance du paysage média OOH, des tendances de l’industrie, ainsi que de l’actualité et des activités des clients et fournisseurs dans les marchés du Québec, du Canada et de la France, et partager les meilleures pratiques avec l’équipe élargie.

 - Collaborer avec les équipes internes, notamment Développement client, Investissement, Production, AdOps, Platform Solutions, Marketing et autres départements, afin de favoriser l’alignement et l’exécution efficace des projets.

 - Contribuer aux initiatives de développement des affaires, notamment en identifiant des occasions de croissance organique, en soutenant les

notes: No tech roles posted, all sales/account management positions
